name: obsidian-markvault
description: Powerful annotation plugin for Obsidian: highlights, bold, underline with notes, tags, and sidebar management.

scripts.test: NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/annotation-store.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/native-annotation.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/region-annotation.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/block-annotation.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/metadata-extension.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS= npx tsx tests/search.test.ts
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Jiang
